title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for potential breast cancer vaccine development. By analyzing protein binding sites, they narrowed 15,000 candidates to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation, demonstrating how AI tools enable accessible cancer research infrastructure.
